description_long: This is a modern outdoor bench featuring a seat and backrest made of horizontal wooden slats with a rich brown finish. The bench is supported by two robust, curved metal legs that extend upward to form integrated armrests on both sides. The metal frame is painted in a light gray color, providing a sleek contrast to the warm wood. The seat and backrest are both wide and flat, offering comfortable support for multiple people. The overall design is both functional and stylish, suitable for parks, sidewalks, or urban plazas. The construction appears sturdy, with all visible fasteners and joints neatly integrated into the design.
description: A modern bench with brown wooden slats and curved gray metal legs and armrests, designed for outdoor urban use. The bench features a supportive backrest and a sturdy, stylish frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bench, highlighting the horizontal wooden slats and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the curved metal leg and armrest, as well as the thickness of the wooden seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the bench with the horizontal wooden slats and the metal frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, with a clear look at the curved metal support and armrest.
attribute_leg_design: curved metal supports with integrated armrests
